Study occurred in the eastern Mediterranean; no sample size available for the individual study periods (1995-2000, 2002-2006) but there is an aggregate value of total individuals caught over both time periods. Data were aggregated for both time intervals that the study took place. Fate proportions were averaged between periods for the species with different proportions for each study period
